en: Republic of South Africa Compensation Fund

Most companies will register for the Compensation Fund through the government but companies in the building or mining industry can opt to register with FEMA (building) or RMA (mining) to be compliant.
The Registration Number can be located on the Letter of Good Standing.

Please input the Nature of Business exactly as it appears on the Letter of Good Standing.
